name: Credentials In Files - Linux
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Igor Fits, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Credentials In Files - Linux
SIGMA Description: Detecting attempts to extract passwords with grep

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%grep%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%password%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Credentials In Files - Linux on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%grep%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%password%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Credentials In Files - Linux
